Termite Control in Haysville, KS

Shaw's Pest Control provides termite inspections and treatment for homes and businesses in Haysville, Kansas. Advance Termite Bait System, liquid treatment, and hybrid options.

Get a Free Estimate ☎ (316) 251-9461

Termite Control in Haysville, Kansas

Termites cause approximately $5 billion in property damage each year in the United States. In Kansas, subterranean termites are the primary threat — they forage underground and enter structures through the foundation, often going undetected until significant damage has occurred.

Shaw's Pest Control offers termite inspections for homeowners and prospective buyers in Haysville. If active termites are found, we offer three treatment approaches: the Advance Termite Bait System (our preferred method), liquid soil treatment, or a hybrid combining both. We use the latest technology to completely treat your structure and suppress the colony.

Don't wait for visible damage. If you suspect termites in your Haysville home or business, contact us for an inspection today.

Serving Haysville Since 1987

Haysville is a Sedgwick County community that Shaw's Pest Control has been proud to serve for decades. As a family-owned company based in the same region, we know the pest challenges that Haysville homeowners and businesses face.
